title: MrCrayfish Legacy Pack
description: MrCrayfish Legacy Pack is only for forge. This Modpack have "all" old famous Mods Like the the gun mod from MrCrayfish.

---

"MrCrayfish Legacy Pack" is an Minecraft Forge modpack with Mods by [MrCrayfish](https://mrcrayfish.com/)

---

**📷 Media**

![Backpecked Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wD9r2e1k/images/957729423bd2fda65ae133ba114de55bd37197f5.gif)
To open the backpack, press the letter B on your keyboard.
![Furniture Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wD9r2e1k/images/23f0ee7bc4cef52261d8f5a3a3468ac9307dcf39.png)

![Vehicle Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wD9r2e1k/images/3829e5350d821397fcd140d2b25a1c78d8d05a57.png)

![Device Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wD9r2e1k/images/8072733194f1643755cd24f7d544771aa125bd53.png)

![Gun Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wD9r2e1k/images/c7fc11c5da935660efc614fa61886abe86874ae6.gif)

---

<details> <summary>🧱 What's Included?</summary>

**🦀 MrCrayfish's Mods Included**

**⚙️ Performance & Optimization**

</details>
<details> <summary>🎯 Who is this for?</summary>

This modpack is perfect for players who:

Enjoy technology, weapons, and vehicles in Minecraft

Want interactive decorations and realistic furniture

Play roleplay, survival, or modded adventure worlds

Want a compact but impactful modpack without unnecessary clutter

Whether you're building, exploring, shooting, or decorating—this pack offers the right blend of features.

</details>
<details> <summary>💡 Note</summary>

Some mods rely on Obfuscate for animations and functionality—already included.

All “Added via overrides” mods are fully integrated and require no extra setup.

</details>
